calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-09-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Eric R. Fleming. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6048. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Plaintiff Kalpeshkumar Gohil, dba Admiral Hotel, was present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Michael Crofut or Celeste Erhard-Santangelo.

Plaintiff's complaint was filed on September 11, 2018.
Defendants' answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on September 17, 2018.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on September 21, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, October 9, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Kalpeshkumar Gohil, dba Admiral Hotel, and against defendants Michael Crofut or Celeste Erhard-Santangelo, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $4,060.00.
Holdover Damages - $1,250.00.
Costs - $270.00.

Total - $5,580.00.

Furthermore, plaintiff Kalpeshkumar Gohil, dba Admiral Hotel, is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 608 O'Farrell Street, Unit 42, San Francisco, CA 94109.

The rental agreement is canceled.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-09-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Judge Pro Tem: Frank Burke, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Kalpeshkumar Gohil is present in pro per.
Defendants Michael Crofut and Celeste Erhard-Santangelo are NOT present.

Plaintiff released by JPT at 2:15pm.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendants. The trial date of October 9, 2018 remains on calendar. (501)
